properties.remark: HAILSTONES RANGED FROM QUARTER INCH TO 1 INCH.
A WEAK TORNADO BRIEFLY TOUCHED DOWN NEAR MT GARFIELD OVER OPEN COUNTRY.
FLASH FLOODING WASHED A COUPLE JEEPS AWAY IN REMOTE AREA SOUTHWEST OF MOAB. ALL OCCUPANTS ESCAPED UNHARMED.
HAIL COVERED 1 INCH DEEP ON THE GROUND.
GUSTS CAUSED BY THUNDERSTORM OUTFLOW FROM STORMS TO THE NORTH. MEASURED AT REEDER MESA ROAD NEAR WHITEWATER.
AFTER VERY HEAVY RAINFALL, PITKIN COUNTY COLORADO SHERIFF REPORTED 4 FEET OF MUD ACROSS HIGHWAY 133, 5 TO 10 MILES SOUTH OF CARBONDALE.
LARGE BRANCHES AND A FEW OLDER TREES WERE BLOWN DOWN. OBSERVER ESTIMATED 60-75 MPH WINDS LASTING 30 MINUTES.
MEASURED IN THE VALLEY OF THE GODS AREA.
HEAVY RAIN AND DIME SIZE HAIL ALSO REPORTED WITH THIS STORM.
SOME WINDOWS BROKEN BY STRONG WIND-DRIVEN HAIL.
MOSTLY ONE INCH DIAMETER. LARGEST HAIL STONES WERE GOLF BALL SIZED.
OBSERVED DEBRIS BENEATH FUNNEL. ON THE GROUND ABOUT 10 MINUTES.
